ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Continued To Dec-06-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A.
Cheri Gorman, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Sheldon H. Ciment.
Default was entered against defendant on July 29, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 29, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Sheldon H. Ciment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,087.76.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,435.92.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $462.00.

Total - $33,985.68.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
